calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration And For A Stay Of Dlse Proceedings
Off Calendar Apr-13-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER POSTMATES LLC'z Petition To Compel Arbitration And For A Stay Of DLSE Proceedings.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is off calendar. Dismissal filed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
